_meta.name: Phoenix Omega — FLUX txt2img Manga (schnell-fp8, webtoon vertical)
_meta.description: EmptyLatent + KSampler denoise 1.0. Generator replaces {{positive_prompt}} / {{negative_prompt}}. Uses flux1-schnell-fp8 (4-step distilled) at steps=4 cfg=1.0 with euler/simple — schnell is incompatible with steps>=8 and cfg>1 and produces silently degraded outputs in those configs. Default dims 1080x1920 = WEBTOON vertical panel; callers may override via per-panel width/height.

inputs.text: {{negative_prompt}}, text, words, letters, captions, watermark, signature, signs, writing, typography, text characters, font, lettering, logos, subtitles, calligraphy
